# Microsoft Graph Changelog - Recent Updates

## Permission Changes (February 23, 2026)
- **FileStorageContainerType.Manage.All**: Updated delegated permission to "no longer require admin consent"
- **FileStorageContainerTypeReg.Manage.All**: Updated delegated permission to "no longer require admin consent"
- **ThreatSubmission.Read**: Updated to "now require admin consent"
- **ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite**: Updated to "now require admin consent"

## Other Notable Additions
- **User resource**: Added Microsoft Graph Bicep resource for infrastructure-as-code scenarios (January 30, 2025)
- **Application resource**: Added Bicep template support (May 21, 2024)
- **ServicePrincipal resource**: Added Bicep template support (May 21, 2024)
- **Microsoft Graph activity logs**: Now available in China operated by 21Vianet (December 16, 2024)

**Note**: Limited March-April 2026 entries. Most recent substantive API changes date to February 23, 2026, focusing on permission consent requirement modifications.

Updated: 2026-04-01
